prompt_engineering.v2_fix: added explicit 'NO ADDED SPECIFICITY OR QUALIFIERS' section with concrete examples

outliers.short_outliers_notes: All 5 cases had input <30 words. Model expanded honestly using metadata without inventing facts.

known_limitations: Litter coherence: when original mentions multiple animals (Quantity>1), model sometimes singularizes. Prompt does not include Quantity field — addressable in future iteration.
Slight ungrammatical fragments on very short inputs (e.g. 'a fractured one leg') — tradeoff accepted vs risk of fact invention.
Batch covers rank 1-562 of tier High (not only top), chosen to ensure diversity; top-ranked animals could be processed separately if needed.
